omopColumns.name: nhs_number

dataSource.name: NhsNumber
dataSource.description: NHS Number data element, the primary identifier for a person within the NHS.

omopColumns.query:
with COSD as (
    select distinct
        Record ->> '$.LinkagePatientId.NhsNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber,
        -- Date of the diagnostic procedure
        unnest ([[Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureDate'], Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures[*].DiagnosticProcedureDate'], recursive := true) as DiagnosticProcedureDate,
        -- The SNOMED CT concept ID used to identify the diagnostic procedure
        unnest ([[Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt.@code'], Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures[*].DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt.@code'], recursive := true) as DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt
    from omop_staging.cosd_staging_901
    where type = 'SK'
)
select distinct
    NhsNumber,
    DiagnosticProcedureDate,
    DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt
from COSD
where NhsNumber is not null
  and DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt is not null;

omopColumns.name: procedure_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Maps concepts to standard valid concepts in the `procedure` domain.

omopColumns.name: procedure_date

dataSource.name: DiagnosticProcedureDate
dataSource.description: Procedure date of the diagnostic procedure. Will be mapped to procedure_date in OMOP. Currently in string format (CCYY-MM-DD) and will be cast to a date type in a later ETL step.

omopColumns.query:
with COSD as (
    select distinct
        Record ->> '$.LinkagePatientId.NhsNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber,
        -- Date of the diagnostic procedure
        unnest ([[Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureDate'], Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures[*].DiagnosticProcedureDate'], recursive := true) as DiagnosticProcedureDate,
        -- The SNOMED CT concept ID used to identify the diagnostic procedure
        unnest ([[Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures.DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt.@code'], Record ->> '$.DiagnosticProcedures[*].DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt.@code'], recursive := true) as DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt
    from omop_staging.cosd_staging_901
    where type = 'SK'
)
select distinct
    NhsNumber,
    DiagnosticProcedureDate,
    DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt
from COSD
where NhsNumber is not null
  and DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt is not null;

omopColumns.name: procedure_type_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Constant value set to `32828`. `EHR episode record`

omopColumns.name: procedure_source_value

dataSource.name: DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt
dataSource.description: The SNOMED CT concept ID used to identify the diagnostic procedure. Will be mapped to procedure_source_value and used to derive procedure_concept_id via SNOMED-to-OMOP concept mapping in a later ETL step.

omopColumns.name: procedure_source_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Resolve Snomed codes to OMOP concepts.

dataSource.name: DiagnosticProcedureSnomedCt
dataSource.description: The SNOMED CT concept ID used to identify the diagnostic procedure. Will be mapped to procedure_source_value and used to derive procedure_concept_id via SNOMED-to-OMOP concept mapping in a later ETL step.
